public_api.name: useUpdateChecker
public_api.description: Client-only hook. Polls /version.json on 5-min interval and on visibilitychange/focus. Latches updateAvailable=true on version mismatch. Fail-soft on all error paths.

public_api.name: shouldShowUpdate
public_api.signature: (fetchedVersion: string, currentVersion: string, alreadyLatched: boolean) => boolean
public_api.description: Exported pure helper for unit testing the comparison-and-latch logic.

public_api.name: UpdateBanner
public_api.description: Dismissible Chakra Alert banner. Returns null when !updateAvailable or dismissed. Uses useCopy() for i18n. Reload triggers window.location.reload().

owned_data: useUpdateChecker: interval ref, latched updateAvailable boolean
UpdateBanner: session-only dismissed boolean (React state, not persisted)
notes: shouldShowUpdate returns true only when fetchedVersion !== currentVersion AND alreadyLatched is false. Once latched, never re-triggers. window.location.reload() only in UpdateBanner onClick handler, never in the hook.
